subject: ASAP: Software Engineer – Java – Telecom/media
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

NordCast (telecom/media) is looking for a lead Software Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:
• Start: ASAP
• Duration: 12 months
• Location: TBD
• Rate: up to 1125 SEK/h

Required tech:
• Java
• Docker
• MySQL
• RabbitMQ
• PyTorch

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Sofia Larsson
Tech Recruiter
Agile Minds
Tel: +46 73 789 01 23
